name: Reputation Badge
description: User reputation score display with numeric score, trust level indicator, and progress toward next trust threshold. Used in dashboards, content cards, and moderation views.

standard.description: Inline reputation display with score number and trust level icon. Color-coded by trust threshold.

slots.icon: Trust level icon: shield for trusted, star for rising, circle for new
slots.label: Trust level text (Trusted / Rising / New)

large.description: Large reputation card with score, trust level, progress bar toward trust threshold (50 points), and stats breakdown.

slots.header: Trust level icon and label with large score number
slots.progress-bar: Progress bar toward trust threshold (50 points)
slots.stats: Approved count, rejected count, featured count row

compact.description: Minimal inline score number with colored dot indicator. For content cards and list items.

slots.dot: Colored dot: green for trusted, yellow for rising, gray for new

visual_brief: Compact inline badge displaying a user's reputation score and trust level. Shows a trust-level icon (shield, star, or checkmark based on level), a numeric score in medium-weight text, and a text label for the trust level (New, Trusted, Verified, etc.) in muted smaller text. A subtle progress indicator shows advancement toward the next trust threshold. The large preset enlarges everything and adds a detailed breakdown tooltip on hover. The compact preset shows icon and score only. Color varies by trust level — gray for new, blue for trusted, gold for verified.

layout_hints.badge_layout: Inline pill: star icon + score number (font-semibold) + level text (text-muted). Background: subtle primary tint. Tooltip on hover shows breakdown.
layout_hints.levels: Level names: Newcomer (0-10), Contributor (11-50), Trusted (51-200), Expert (201+). Color intensifies with level.

responsive.mobile: Compact preset preferred. Badge renders inline at standard body text size.
responsive.tablet: Standard badge with icon, score, and label visible.
responsive.desktop: Full badge with progress indicator. Large preset with tooltip on hover.

motion.micro: Level indicators and progress cues may brighten or animate softly on hover, but the badge should remain calm and compact.
motion.transitions: Score and level updates should cross-fade or count smoothly over 150-220ms without causing layout shift.

keyboard: If the badge exposes a tooltip or breakdown, keyboard users should be able to reveal it via focus and dismiss it via Escape.
announcements: Score and trust level should be announced together rather than relying on color or iconography alone.
accessibility.focus_management: If the badge is interactive, preserve focus on the badge trigger when tooltips or detail popovers close.
